goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — shared multi-provider LLM fallback layer over the four LLM drivers (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L1574, L2407)
rationale: The per-provider LLM drivers (anthropic/openai-compat/xai/venice-ai) exist, but no shared dispatch Layer owns user-key>env precedence + graceful fallback; GOLD flags this as a gap, so the user-key->env precedence + Layer.orElse fallback chain is net-new in a new dispatch packet.
cautions: Re-express switch/try-catch as typed-error Effect Layer.orElse, not ported imperatively

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — declarative multi-provider client config (round-robin/fallback/retry) (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: BAML client declarations are a config-pattern reference for the new dispatch packet (round-robin/ordered-fallback/named-retry strategies); the LLM drivers already exist so only the resilience-strategy composition is net-new, with retry-policy DRY shared with effect-orchestration-patterns.
cautions: BAML is BoundaryML's external Apache-2.0 DSL/runtime — port the PATTERN, do not adopt the runtime
recommendation reference-only

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — multi-provider fallback layer; per-provider OWN default model (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: The resilient-wrapper + fallback-chain pattern, and especially the per-provider OWN env-driven default-model resolution (so a fallback never inherits an incompatible model name), is the highest-value insight for the net-new shared dispatch Layer; the provider drivers themselves already exist.
cautions: agentmemory is Apache-2.0 + plain TS/Zod — reuse algorithm/shape, reimplement in Effect-Schema

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — progressive-disclosure tool-description conventions (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2090)
rationale: @beep/nlp-mcp already has a typed NlpToolkit, but the progressive-disclosure 'teach the model WHEN to call' description convention is the gap; it belongs in the MCP tool-authoring conventions of the new auth-gated-registration packet that coordinates the existing nlp-mcp server.

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — conditional registration + graceful degradation topology (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L1574)
rationale: proxy-to-full-engine vs reduced-local-fallback (expose only IMPLEMENTED_TOOLS when heavy backend unreachable) is the conditional-registration / graceful-degradation strand the auth-gated-registration packet owns; no src implements tier/availability-gated Toolkit composition today.
cautions: recommendation study

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — provider/model-string select + schema-validated structured output (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: The provider/model-string single-select + typed response_model maps cleanly onto the new dispatch Layer plus effect/Schema-validated structured outputs; the response_model->effect/Schema pattern is a reference for the dispatch packet rather than net-new extraction (langextract already owns schema-first extraction).
cautions: Instructor/Pydantic is Python — port the provider-string-select + schema-output shape only; recommendation reference

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — tool permission matrix (read=allow/mutate=ask/edit+bash=deny) (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2068)
rationale: The declarative per-tool allow/ask/deny permission matrix is the MCP-side write-vs-read gate the auth-gated-registration packet owns (tier-gating at the candidate->approved wall); the approval/audit plumbing it feeds lives in goals/agent-governance-control-plane and aligns with the epistemic ClaimGate boundary.
cautions: Keep the MCP permission matrix MCP-side; reuse existing ClaimGate/approval plumbing rather than a parallel gate

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — bare MCP scaffold lessons are dups (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L1574, L2446)
rationale: The minimal stdio MCP server scaffold (Server construction, ListTools/CallTool, empty ListResources/ListPrompts stubs) is already owned by the two shipped Effect-native MCP servers built on McpServer.layerStdio; gapStatus=dup. The empty-list-method client-compat checklist can be referenced into the auth-gated packet, but no build opens.
cautions: recommendation reference-only — DUP per the two-MCP-server substrate

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — provider registry + key precedence + actionable missing-key errors (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2394)
rationale: Typed PROVIDER_REGISTRY + strict key-resolution precedence (CLI>params>env, prefix auto-detect) + structured setupInstructions errors is exactly the shape the new dispatch Layer needs; re-express as an Effect Layer with typed Config errors. Drivers exist; the registry/precedence/error layer is net-new.
cautions: harvest-mcp license flagged unknown — reimplement-don't-copy

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — per-domain tool registrars with narrow injected context (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2395)
rationale: Per-domain registrar functions each receiving a narrow context factory is the registration-organization pattern for conditional/credential-keyed Toolkit composition; nlp-mcp already mounts two toolkits into one server, so this refines the composition approach rather than re-scaffolding.
cautions: nlp-mcp already composes multiple toolkits via McpServer.layerStdio — refine, do not duplicate

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — un-gated tool-calling RAG (the anti-pattern beep rejects) (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §RAG)
rationale: The Vercel-AI getInformation tool that feeds raw chunks straight to the LLM is the explicit anti-pattern the rag-retrieval-projection packet is defined against; it belongs there as a negative reference — beep tool outputs must carry CandidateClaim+Evidence spans through the ClaimGate, not bare chunks.
cautions: lawyergpt license UNKNOWN — negative reference only
un-gated RAG is an explicit anti-pattern; do not port the design

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — graceful 'API key missing' as structured content (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L1574)
rationale: Returning a structured {error:api_key_required, tool, envVar, registrationUrl} content block instead of throwing is one of the named net-new items in the auth-gated-registration seed; a shared helper supports conditional tool availability for a solo-attorney local setup.
cautions: mcp-uspto is MIT (portable)

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — progressive-disclosure tool ladder metadata->snippet->read (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: The metadata->find_in_case->read_case context-reduction ladder is the progressive-disclosure pattern the auth-gated packet owns; it lands on the courtlistener tool surface built by gov-legal-data-driver-codegen but the ladder design is the MCP-side concern.
cautions: mike is AGPL/unknown-license — reimplement the ladder design, do not copy

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — confirmation gate + untrusted-context wrapping + audit log (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2068)
rationale: The MCP tool governance blueprint (requires_confirmation filter, 'MCP responses are untrusted external context' injection-defense suffix, audit-log sink) is the auth-gated-registration packet's core; confirmation/audit coordinate with goals/agent-governance-control-plane and the injection-defense suffix cross-links the ingestion-security secret-governance split.
cautions: mike is AGPL/unknown-license — reimplement the ethical-wall/injection-hardening contract from spec

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — single-source tool schema adapted per provider (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Define tools once, dispatch per provider (Claude/Gemini normalization) is part of the multi-provider dispatch concern; routed there as a study item — but effect/unstable/ai Toolkit likely already abstracts provider tool formats, so verify before building.
cautions: effect/unstable/ai Toolkit may already provide single-source->per-provider tool dispatch (potential DUP) — verify against the vendored effect-v4 AI module first
recommendation study

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — tool annotations + dual content/structuredContent convention (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2334)
rationale: The paired-const-tool + run() convention with readOnly/idempotent/openWorld annotation hints and dual human content[]/machine structuredContent is the tool-definition convention the auth-gated packet standardizes; annotations directly feed conditional-tool/governance metadata. Tool.make schema I/O already exists, so only the annotation-hint convention is net-new.
cautions: patent-search-mcp-server is MIT (portable)

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — conditional tool registration keyed on available credentials (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2298)
rationale: Registering a source's tools only when its keys are present is the canonical conditional/credential-keyed Toolkit composition this packet owns; re-expressed as building the Toolkit only from driver Layers whose Effect Config resolved, with write tools behind the candidate->approved wall.
cautions: patents-mcp-server is MIT (portable); reimplement on effect Config/Layer, not FastMCP

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — context-reduction: UUID+TTL resource handle store (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Surfacing a fetchable UUID+TTL handle (with UUID_V4-gated filesystem access + background sweep) instead of returning large PDF bytes to the model is a clean progressive-disclosure/context-reduction primitive for the auth-gated packet; lands against nlp-mcp and the USPTO File-Wrapper download path.
cautions: patents-mcp-server is MIT (portable)

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — multi-provider config loader + source-availability matrix (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: loadConfig's typed env parsing, path/credential expansion, and getAvailableSources configured/healthy matrix is the multi-provider credential-layering + check-api-status health-probe template the auth-gated packet owns; coordinates with the per-driver env-auth matrix in gov-legal-data-driver-codegen.
cautions: priority IMPUTED P2 (catalog record had no priority/finalBeepTarget/gapStatus fields)
patents-mcp-server is MIT (portable)

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — capability-gated driver self-disable on absent credentials (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2360)
rationale: A data source that self-disables when credentials are absent (catch auth failure, set client=None, every method guards) is the conditional/auth-gated Layer pattern this packet owns; the BigQuery driver itself is net-new under uspto-patent-driver-depth, but the capability-gating pattern is MCP-side.
cautions: patents-mcp license MIT; the Google Patents BigQuery driver is separately net-new (uspto-patent-driver-depth), requires GCP creds

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — single-tool method-dispatch vs many-tools tradeoff (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: One uspto_patents tool with a method discriminator vs ~25 discrete tools is a context-reduction tool-surface-design tradeoff (with per-method required-arg validation) the auth-gated packet evaluates; routed as a design study, not a build.
cautions: recommendation study — giant arg signature hurts schema clarity vs discrete tools

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — tool registry + schema-validated dispatch with requiresAuth/category gating (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: withInputValidation (schema decode -> ToolValidationError) is largely covered by effect Tool.make's failureMode:'return'->AiToolError; the genuinely net-new piece is the ToolMetadata registry's requiresAuth/category gating, which is the auth-gated packet's concern.
cautions: effect Tool.make already provides schema-validated I/O + typed AiToolError (partial DUP) — reuse it; only requiresAuth/category registry gating is net-new

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — round-robin + ordered-fallback + per-client retry-policy reference (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: BAML CustomFast (round-robin) / OpenaiFallback (ordered fallback) with per-client retry_policy is a concise reference for provider abstraction + retry-policy attachment in the dispatch packet; retry-policy DRY shared with effect-orchestration-patterns.
cautions: BAML is external Apache-2.0 DSL; beep uses Effect not BAML — reference the strategy shape only
recommendation reference; serendipitous relevance

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — USE WHEN / DO NOT USE tool-description routing + annotations (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2478)
rationale: Embedding USE WHEN / DO NOT USE disambiguation prose + readOnly/idempotent/openWorld annotation hints in each tool definition reduces tool-selection errors and keeps the agent on candidate-vs-proof rails; adapt the prose convention into the existing effect Tool definitions of nlp-mcp/m365-mcp.
cautions: screenpipe license flagged unknown — adapt the prose pattern, not the framework/code

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — server-side response reshaping for context-window protection (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2479)
rationale: Columnar csv/tsv (~70% cut), deduped outline/tree (~91% cut), dotted-path fields whitelist, and max_content_length middle-truncation are concrete context-reduction tactics for MCP tool outputs / KG-query results — a server-side response-reshaping layer the auth-gated packet owns.
cautions: screenpipe license flagged unknown — reimplement the reshaping tactics

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — WASM code-mode context reduction over tool output (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Running an LLM-written JS extractor against a tool's raw response inside a QuickJS WASM sandbox (capturing only console.log, with before/after byte metrics) is a strong progressive-disclosure primitive that pairs with span-grounded extraction; routed as a context-reduction study for the auth-gated packet.
cautions: us-gov-open-data-mcp license unverified — reimplement-don't-copy
QuickJS WASM sandbox is a heavy dependency; recommendation study

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — columnar response envelope + server-side trend/stat (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Standardized timeseries/table/record/list envelopes with toColumnar/stripNulls compression plus server-side detectTrend (linear-regression slope+R2) is a reusable tool-result-formatting helper that compresses payloads before they hit the LLM and computes numeric summaries server-side.
cautions: us-gov-open-data-mcp license unverified — reimplement-don't-copy

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — metadata-driven module auto-discovery + generated instructions/routing (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2372)
rationale: Per-API ApiModule auto-discovery with default annotations, selective loading, startup env validation, and buildInstructions() auto-generating system instructions + a question-type->sources routing table is the conditional-loading + generated-agent-guidance pattern; coordinates with per-driver metadata in gov-legal-data-driver-codegen.
cautions: us-gov-open-data-mcp license unverified — reimplement-don't-copy

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — ApiModule/ModuleMeta contract with Domain/QuestionType/RouteHint (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2372)
rationale: The schema-first ModuleMeta contract (Domain union, QuestionType union, RouteHint question->tool mapping) is the typed driver/skill registry + query-routing metadata behind #5's generated routing table; lands as agent-routing metadata feeding @beep/agents-domain, owned alongside the auth-gated registration packet.
cautions: us-gov-open-data-mcp license unverified — reimplement the typed taxonomy in effect/Schema; recommendation study

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — flat-string DSL tool inputs -> typed query objects (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Exposing simple flat string params ('field v1,v2', 'field from:to', 'field order') to the model and deterministically parsing them into typed query objects is a generic MCP tool-input ergonomics helper; the example targets ODP filters so it cross-links the uspto query-DSL work.
cautions: Re-themed from legal-nlp; the ODP-filter example overlaps the uspto-patent-driver-depth query DSL — keep the parser generic in nlp-mcp, escape Lucene specials in the uspto layer

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — single OpenAPI spec -> dual SDK + MCP server codegen (GOLD_SYNTHESIS L2050, single highest-leverage item)
rationale: The createOrvalConfig two-target (typed SDK + MCP server from one OpenAPI input) is exactly the OpenAPI->driver+MCP codegen the gov-legal-data-driver-codegen packet owns; port the two-target ARCHITECTURE onto Effect/effect-rpc + effect/Schema (reuse runpod/acp codegen precedent), not the Orval/axios/Zod output.
cautions: us-legal-tools is MIT but value is the PIPELINE not the axios/Zod output — port architecture onto Effect/HttpApi
Orval @orval/mcp generator is single-spec-mode only

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — MCP tool registration with structured path/query/body param groups (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: The Orval-generated server.tool(name, desc, {queryParams|bodyParams|pathParams}, handler) convention with operationId-derived names is the tool-registration shape the codegen pipeline emits; lands in gov-legal-data-driver-codegen, with the param-grouping convention cross-linked to the auth-gated registration packet.
cautions: us-legal-tools MIT — port the param-grouping convention onto effect/Schema tool inputs

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — rich per-field .describe()/enum/default tool-input metadata (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2311)
rationale: Per-field describe() text, enum constraints, defaults, and pagination cursors are the LLM-facing tool contract; port the shape to effect/Schema field annotations for MCP tool inputs — the precise-affordance convention the auth-gated packet standardizes across nlp-mcp and codegen'd servers.
cautions: us-legal-tools MIT — port the annotation richness to effect/Schema, not Zod

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — multi-provider MCP server env-auth matrix (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: The per-server required-env-credential matrix (no-auth public APIs unconditional; COURTLISTENER/GOV_INFO/DOL keyed sources gate on env presence) is the multi-provider auth matrix + conditional registration the auth-gated packet owns; coordinates with the per-driver auth in gov-legal-data-driver-codegen.
cautions: us-legal-tools MIT; CourtListener V4 ENFORCES 'Authorization: Token <key>' (not Bearer); GovInfo/DOL need api.data.gov api_key; eCFR/FedReg keyless

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — tier/role-gated conditional tool registration (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2384)
rationale: The premium-flag tier filter on listTools() + per-call tier rpcError is the tier/role-gated conditional registration the auth-gated packet owns, re-cast as read-vs-write gating at the candidate->approved wall; approval semantics coordinate with goals/agent-governance-control-plane.
cautions: uspto-patents-mcp MIT — reimplement tier gating on effect Config/tier, not the hand-rolled premium flag

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — hand-rolled MCP JSON-RPC transport is a dup of McpServer.layerStdio (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: A ~90-line dependency-free MCP JSON-RPC server (initialize/tools.list/tools.call/ping + content[{type:text}] envelope) is already owned by the two shipped Effect-native servers on McpServer.layerStdio; gapStatus=dup. Keep only as a reference for a future Tauri-sidecar lightweight transport — no packet opens.
cautions: recommendation reference-only — DUP per the two-MCP-server substrate; pins protocolVersion 2025-06-18

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — progressive-disclosure named field tiers (minimal/balanced/complete) (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design L2323)
rationale: YAML-driven named field-set tiers ('95-99% context reduction', documentBag 100x-blowup warnings) over a USPTO response schema is the progressive-disclosure field-tier projection named in the auth-gated seed; the projection convention is MCP-side, the concrete PFW field catalogue lands in the uspto driver.
cautions: uspto_pfw_mcp MIT — reimplement field-tier projection in effect/Schema; the PFW field catalogue feeds uspto-patent-driver-depth

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS block steering progressive tool discovery (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: A SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS string declaring always-available vs deferred tools, the recommended discovery workflow, and tier explanations is the progressive-disclosure server-guidance the auth-gated packet owns — steering a tool-search client without exposing all tools at once.
cautions: uspto_pfw_mcp MIT (portable)

goldSynthesisSection: mcp-design — guidance delivered as versioned MCP Resources (context-on-demand) (GOLD_SYNTHESIS §MCP-design)
rationale: Packaging guidance content as versioned/tagged/typed MCP Resources (name/description/version/tags/mcp_type) for on-demand retrieval, instead of baking it into every tool description, keeps tool surfaces lean while staying client-compatible — a clean externalize-guidance pattern for the auth-gated packet.
cautions: uspto_pfw_mcp MIT (portable)
